settings.text:
Clinically proven to improve blood flow, energy, sexual health, and full-body wellness.

Nitric Oxide Support (formerly NO Foundation) provides a convenient, clinically effective, two-capsule daily dose to support healthy blood flow, heart health, energy, sexual performance, and overall vitality.

settings.body:
Only a small percentage of dietary supplements are tested in gold-standard human clinical trials. Berkeley Life® Nitric Oxide Support has been evaluated in double-blind, placebo-controlled research demonstrating its ability to increase nitric oxide bioavailability in humans. The dietary nitrate ingredients used in our formulation are supported by a growing body of peer-reviewed clinical research validating improvements in vascular function, endothelial health, and blood pressure regulation.

The Impact of Clinical Proof

Double-blind, placebo-controlled trials (DBPCTs) are considered the gold standard in scientific research because they help ensure:

  • Bias elimination
  • Control for placebo effect
  • Validated efficacy
  • Safety and tolerability assessment

By studying the full nitrate formulation as it is consumed, Berkeley Life® ensures the product is evaluated for real-world effectiveness and safety—not just theoretical ingredient benefits.

Nitric Oxide Production

Berkeley Life® is formulated to increase nitric oxide through the dietary nitrate → nitrite → nitric oxide pathway. Unlike L-arginine-based supplements, this pathway remains active even when endothelial nitric oxide synthase (eNOS) declines with age.

  • Clinical Trial Results: In a double-blind, placebo-controlled study, participants taking Berkeley Life® demonstrated significant increases in salivary nitrite and plasma nitrite compared to placebo. Test strip readings correlated with laboratory measurements, confirming improved nitric oxide bioavailability.

Vascular & Endothelial Health

Nitric oxide is essential for healthy blood vessel function. It supports vasodilation, circulation, and endothelial integrity—all of which naturally decline with age.

  • Clinical Trial Results: In clinical research evaluating dietary nitrate supplementation over 12 weeks, participants showed improvements in endothelial function and reductions in carotid artery stiffness, a recognized marker of cardiovascular risk.

Blood Pressure Support

Nitric oxide helps relax and widen blood vessels, supporting healthy blood pressure regulation.

  • Clinical Trial Results: Clinical studies of dietary nitrates have demonstrated improvements in systolic blood pressure and vascular responsiveness compared to placebo, particularly with consistent daily use over 8–12 weeks.

Energy & Oxygen Efficiency

Nitric oxide plays a critical role in oxygen delivery and mitochondrial signaling. Healthy nitric oxide levels support efficient energy production and muscle performance.

  • Clinical Research Findings: Research on dietary nitrates has shown improvements in oxygen utilization and exercise efficiency, including reduced oxygen cost during physical activity.

Aging & Nitric Oxide Decline

Nitric oxide production naturally declines with age due to oxidative stress, hormonal shifts, and reduced enzyme activity. Berkeley Life® provides a nitrate-based pathway that supports nitric oxide production independently of age-related enzymatic decline, offering measurable vascular support as the body’s natural production decreases.

settings.title: Key Ingredients
settings.ingredient_1_description: A potent source of dietary nitrates that is broken down in the body to form Nitric Oxide. Two of our capsules has the dietary nitrate equivalent of 7oz of beetroot.
settings.ingredient_2_description: An essential vitamin and potent antioxidant, Vitamin C helps convert nitrite to nitric oxide.
settings.ingredient_3_description: A crucial mineral respected for its ability to relax blood vessels; sufficient magnesium intake is important for cardiovascular health.

settings.question: Can Berkeley Life be taken with blood pressure or ED medications?
settings.answer: Yes. Berkeley Life is safe and well-tolerated with no known contraindications. However, we recommend speaking with your healthcare provider to ensure the right combination of medication and supplementation.

settings.question: Are there any contraindication to using Berkeley Life?
settings.answer: There are no known contraindications or reported adverse events. A good rule of thumb: if you can eat a leafy green salad, you can take Berkeley Life.

settings.question: Is it safe for people with oxalate sensitivities?
settings.answer: Yes. The oxalate content is extremely low—less than a single spinach leaf. Even individuals with sensitivities generally tolerate it well.

settings.question: Should I talk to my healthcare provider before starting Berkeley Life?
settings.answer:
Berkeley Life NO Foundation is a dietary supplement that does not require a prescription. It’s formulated with plant-based nitrates to help support healthy nitric oxide levels, circulation, and cardiovascular wellness. It is safe for most adults to take it as part of their daily routine.

However, because it naturally supports blood pressure and circulation, it is recommended to consult your healthcare provider before starting, especially if you are pregnant, nursing, have a medical condition, or take prescription medications (such as for blood pressure or sexual function).

settings.question: Is Berkeley Life safe for daily use?
settings.answer: Yes. Berkeley Life is manufactured in the United States under FDA-registered, GMP-certified facilities, and undergoes rigorous internal and third-party testing to ensure safety and potency.

settings.question: What quality standards do you follow?
settings.answer: Every ingredient is tested for identity, potency, and microbiological safety before use. Finished products undergo comprehensive quality checks and third-party testing before being released.

settings.question: Can I validate that Berkeley Life is working for me?
settings.answer: Yes. You can use the Nitric Oxide Test Strips before and 90 minutes after taking the supplement to confirm effectiveness.

settings.question: Where is Berkeley Life made?
settings.answer: Supplements are manufactured in the USA, and test strips are produced in Europe.

settings.question: How much should I take daily?
settings.answer: Take two capsules daily with water, preferably after a meal.

settings.question: How long do I need to take Berkeley Life before I see results?
settings.answer: Results vary, some notice a difference right away, while others see benefits after about a month. Consistency is key, and test strips can validate improvements quickly.

settings.question: How long should I continue taking Nitric Oxide support?
settings.answer: Since natural nitric oxide production declines with age, ongoing daily support through diet or supplementation is recommended.

settings.question: What if my test strip doesn’t change color?
settings.answer: If you recently ate or drank, saliva may be diluted, causing a false negative. In rare cases, low oral bacteria levels may impact conversion. We recommend discussing ways to support your oral microbiome with your healthcare provider.

settings.question: How long will it take to get my order?
settings.answer: Orders placed before 2 PM EST ship the same day and typically arrive in 3–7 business days within the US. Canadian orders may take 7–16 days.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: We currently ship to the US and Canada. Customers in the UK and Europe can purchase Berkeley Life through our trusted partner, Healf.

settings.question: How do I manage my subscription?
settings.answer: You can manage your subscription by logging into your account. If you have trouble, contact help@berkeleylife.com or call 844-517-1327 (Mon–Fri, 9 AM–5 PM EST).

settings.faq_subtitle: We know trying a new supplement can raise doubts. That’s why we’ve grouped the most common questions about medications, safety, dosage, and shipping, so you get clear answers and feel confident starting your Berkeley Life journey.

settings.heading: Do you ship overseas?
settings.content: Yes, we ship all over the world. Shipping costs will apply, and will be added at checkout. We run discounts and promotions all year, so stay tuned for exclusive deals.

settings.heading: How long will it take to get my order?
settings.content: It depends on where you are. Orders processed here will take 5-7 business days to arrive. Overseas deliveries can take anywhere from 7-16 days. Delivery details will be provided in your confirmation email.

settings.heading: Can I return my product?
settings.content: We always aim for make sure our customers love our products, but if you do need to return an order, we’re happy to help. Just email us directly and we’ll take you through the process.

settings.heading: Can I get my product personalized?
settings.content: It depends on the creator and the product. All options are outlined on the product page, so look out for customization options there.
